full_text:
Miao Pei (Wenya) 繆裴 (文雅)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Miao Pei (繆裴), styledWenya (文雅), was born in Donghai. Widely read in the classics, refused all offers of employment.
